input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(ui): restyle workers views with design tokens [ddx-312503d6]

Apply token system to workers/+layout.svelte and workers/[workerId]/+page.svelte:
- Worker list: mono-code IDs (font-mono-code text-lever), status indicators via CSS vars (text-status-running/open/failed), bg-surface cards with border-line
- Detail view: label-caps field headers, border-line sections, token colors throughout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

data.text:
Commit successful. The two workers views are now restyled with the design token system:

- **`workers/+layout.svelte`**: IDs use `font-mono-code text-lever`, status indicators use `text-status-running/open/failed` CSS vars, all panels/cards use `bg-bg-surface border-border-line` tokens, table headers use `text-label-caps font-label-caps uppercase tracking-wide`
- **`workers/[workerId]/+page.svelte`**: panel background uses `bg-bg-elevated`, all section borders use `border-border-line`, field headers use `text-label-caps font-label-caps uppercase tracking-wide text-fg-muted`, mono IDs use `font-mono-code text-lever`, and reconnect banner uses `alert-caution`
